commands.review_summary:
The PR bounds device-handshake public keys and signatures, rejects implausible Ed25519 inputs before crypto, adds a per-IP pre-auth signature-verification limiter, and includes gateway tests plus a WebSocket flood PoC.

PR surface: Source +152, Tests +450, Other +341. Total +943 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at high confidence from source: unauthenticated device-bearing connections reach Ed25519 key parsing and signature verification, and the supplied PoC defines a concrete running-gateway flood sequence with measured latency degradation. I did not execute the destructive load probe during this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The concurrency defect has a narrow mechanical repair using an established repository seam, although contributor-owned real-environment proof and gateway security sign-off remain required before merge.
